today_topic.text: 2020年 - JO1が「PROTOSTAR」から「無限大（infinity）」でデビュー<ref>{{Cite web|和書|title=『PRODUCE101JAPAN』JO1、デビューメンバー11人が決定 初代センターは最年少17歳の豆原一成|url=https://www.oricon.co.jp/news/2150690/full/|website=ORICON NEWS|accessdate=2024-04-09}}</ref>。

paper.title: Language, Society, and Culture: Introducing Anthropological Linguistics , and: Language, Society, and Culture: Exercise and Activity Manual , and: The Anthropology of Language: An Introduction to Linguistic Anthropology , and: The Anthropology of Language: An Introduction to Linguistic Anthropology.
